subcodes.title: Some Answered Questions #047 The Evolution of the Universe and the Origin of Man
subcodes.first_line: Know that it is one of the most abstruse questions of divine philosophy that the world of existence—that is, this endless universe—has no beginning.
subcodes.first_line_orig: بدان که یک مسئله از غوامض مسائل الهیه اینست که این عالم وجود یعنی این کون غیر متناهی بدایتی ندارد
subcodes.subjects: @evolution; human evolution, @names and attributes of God, @eternality vs. origination; creation from nothingness, @creation of the world
